title: 200 PCS Glitter Foam Stickers Self Adhesive Foam Star/Heart Shapes Glitter Stickers Colourful Craft Stickers for Wall Decoration, Card Making, Craft DIY,Crafting, Scrapbooking
features: ❤★[Flash Sticker Set]-The package contains 200 flash stickers, including heart-shaped, star-shaped, and various sizes. With a weight of 60g, it can meet your various DIY needs.

❤★[Foam Stickers]-These glitter bubble stickers are made of foam, which has the effects of glitter, lightness and glitter, and is very suitable for card making and wall decoration. These foam stickers are ideal for use on glossy paper, cardboard or ordinary bond paper. It also works well on other surfaces such as glass and wood.

❤★[Self-Adhesive Foam Stickers]-These glittering star/heart stickers are self-adhesive. You only need to tear off the sticker on the back and paste it wherever you want. There is no need to buy glue or tape. It is easy and convenient to paste or tear off. Easy to use,everyone can easily get it done!
❤★[Rich Colors and Novel Styles]-There are stars and heart-shaped stickers in red, pink, yellow, blue and other colors. They are very cute and loved by handicraft enthusiasts

❤★[Multiple Uses]-This product is designed for people aged 15 and above, with a wide range of uses and strong practicality. It can meet the needs of daily office supplies and auxiliary needs of adults, as well as be used for home decoration and decoration, adding a unique style and warm atmosphere to the home space; At the same time, it is also suitable for DIY photo album production, helping to record precious moments in life
description: Product Description Still worrying about manual homework? Do you also want to spend some time with your family to do happy activities after get off work? As a teacher, do you also want to give teen a little encouragement to make them more interested in learning? We recommend a flash bubble sticker combination that is very suitable Very easy to use These self-adhesive foam stickers simply peel off the sticker on the back and paste it on your project. There is no need to buy glue or tape, which is easy or convenient to paste. The operation is very easy for everybody Foam material These stickers are made of waterproof foam, safe, non-toxic and odorless material.The lightweight material is easy to store, which is helpful for cultivating storage and classification habits from an early age. Please rest assured to buy and use. Stimulate creativity The set contains 200 flash stickers, including heart-shaped, star-shaped, and various sizes. Make DIY handmade works by themselves to stimulate creativity and imagination. At the same time, create more family time for you, enhance communication, accompany and witness their growth Create happy atmosphere These beautiful stickers can be used in many occasions, such as Halloween Christmas party supplies, home decoration and handicrafts, and can be pasted on many different surfaces, such as walls, floors and blackboards.
